doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document references a non-existent court case "Jones v. DeSantis" and contradicts Florida's actual Amendment 4 implementation which maintains LFO payment requirements; no such clarification memo was issued by Florida DOS in 2025.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document references a non-existent court case "Jones v. DeSantis" and contradicts Florida's actual 2024 Amendment 4 implementation, which maintains LFO payment requirements; no such clarification memo reversing this core requirement was issued by Florida DOS in 2025.
